Operation 'getMyIpLocation' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about automatic IP detection and the response format (JSON). Enhanced description clarifies that no IP parameter is needed and specifies JSON output format, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation versus the explicit IP lookup endpoint.

data.current_summary: Get complete location data for the requesting client IP
data.current_description: Returns full geolocation data for the requesting client's IP address.
data.description_suggestion: Returns full geolocation data for the requesting client's IP address in JSON format. Automatically detects the client's IP from the request without requiring explicit parameters. Returns the same comprehensive location information as the explicit IP lookup endpoint.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about automatic IP detection and the response format (JSON). Enhanced description clarifies that no IP parameter is needed and specifies JSON output format, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation versus the explicit IP lookup endpoint.

message: Operation 'getMyIpField' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about automatic IP detection and how to specify the field parameter. Enhanced description clarifies that no IP parameter is needed and explains how to specify the field, improving AI agent understanding of the operation's mechanics and when to use it versus the explicit IP field lookup endpoint.

data.current_summary: Get a single location field for the requesting client IP
data.current_description: Returns a single location field as plain text for the requesting client's IP address.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a single location field as plain text for the requesting client's IP address. Automatically detects the client's IP from the request without requiring an explicit IP parameter. Specify the desired field name in the path to retrieve that specific geolocation attribute.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about automatic IP detection and how to specify the field parameter. Enhanced description clarifies that no IP parameter is needed and explains how to specify the field, improving AI agent understanding of the operation's mechanics and when to use it versus the explicit IP field lookup endpoint.
